content: WhatsApp Message Chain: Priya Chatterjee (9876543210) to Dr. Arjun Mehta (9988776655), dated 14/06/2016: 'You’re the only one who can keep this safe — don’t let Sunita get her hands on it.' Attached: Image of the 2015 handwritten note. Message deleted from Priya’s phone but recovered from cloud backup. Dr. Mehta claims he received it as a 'courtesy' — but the message shows intent to conceal the note from Sunita. No prior communication between them on property matters before this date. Message sent from Priya’s home IP address.
